name: Iter19 — DeveloperSearch with empty input does not crash
description: When a user clicks the View Profile button in the Developer Search navbar widget without typing any username, the app should either show a validation message or remain on the same page — it must NOT navigate to a broken /developer/ URL or crash.

planSteps.description: Verify the Developer Search input field is visible in the navbar
Click the View Profile button without typing anything in the Developer Search input
Verify the app does NOT navigate to a broken URL like /developer/ with no username segment
Verify no blank page or JavaScript error is shown — the page remains usable with visible content
